axis_responsibility.Agent: Adapter error is performer/adapter receipt evidence without returned AgentFact; do not synthesize returned, success, failure, or quality fields.
axis_responsibility.Brick: Work invariant is the declared Building Plan and birth/declaration chain; the repair should preserve declared plan copy purity.
axis_responsibility.Link: Stop disposition is human/COO-authored transition lifecycle evidence; support records it but does not choose Movement or target.
axis_responsibility.Support: support/operator and support/recording may order writes, preserve/reconcile evidence, and prevent live adapter calls on paper-stop.

candidate_file_changes: support/operator/run.py: linear run birth/declaration write before started event and adapter calls; overwrite reset hook if kept at run entry.
support/operator/walker_kernel.py: dynamic run birth/declaration write before started event and adapter calls; avoid resume re-emitting started.
support/operator/walker_resume.py: adapter-error stop paper-close branch before recorded-return replay/live-run path.
support/recording/declaration_packets.py: expose or factor a safe pre-adapter declaration-chain writer if current private helper is not appropriate.
support/recording/raw_claim_trace.py or support/operator/run.py: centralize overwrite claim_trace/raw-manifest reconciliation/reset using current raw-stream discipline.
support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py, support/checkers/check_profile.py, and the relevant support/checkers/profiles/*.yaml: focused pins and mutation probes.
checker_or_verifier_plan: Extend existing checker families, preferably support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py plus check_profile dispatch/profile wiring; avoid new standalone check_*.py unless separately admitted.

F15/F17 fixture: temp output root, first-step adapter callable raises, assert root/work/declared-building-plan.json and intake artifacts exist after interruption, and started projection has a root to read.

F16 fixture: append/select a stop disposition for an adapter-error hold, run resume with a runner/callable that records invocations, assert zero adapter invocations and ended-by-disposition evidence; include mutation RED that restores the live rerun path.
F19 fixture: create/reuse an overwrite relaunch over an adapter-error root and assert lifecycle/path raw_ref resolution passes; mutation RED skips the clear/reconcile step.
F18 unit probe: fake command_runner captures Codex argv under BRICK_CODEX_EPHEMERAL unset, 0, and 1; assert --ephemeral iff 1.
Final implementation proof still needs compileall, git diff --check, focused pins, mutation REDs, and full temp-source-copy check_profile --all; not run in this read-only design pass.
returned.design_summary: Design the repair as support-surface hardening only: write a byte-identical declaration birth certificate before the first adapter boundary, make adapter-error stop disposition a paper close that never asks the adapter for a missing return, reset stale generated claim/manifest evidence on overwrite, and make Codex local transcript persistence the default unless BRICK_CODEX_EPHEMERAL=1 is explicitly set.
edge_cases: First-step adapter error with zero completed Agent returns.
Mid-walk adapter error with earlier completed returns but no returned fact for the held step.

Resume stop on stale roots lacking the birth certificate should no longer fail once F15 birth write is in place for newly produced roots; older roots remain not proven unless migrated or fixture-handled.
Overwrite after adapter-error frontier followed by a complete run must not leave frontier_trace or raw:link-frontier refs from the previous attempt.
BRICK_CODEX_EPHEMERAL unset, empty, or non-1 should all drop --ephemeral; only literal 1 preserves current ephemeral behavior.
evidence_refs: Memory was used only as routing context for F14/F15/F16 search terms, not as current repo authority.
invariants: Every admitted walk root has work/declared-building-plan.json before any adapter invocation.
building_started is emitted only after the root and declaration birth certificate exist.
Adapter-error stop disposition performs zero adapter invocations and records ended-by-disposition without inventing an Agent return.
overwrite_existing=True starts from claim_trace/raw-manifest/evidence-manifest consistency for the fresh attempt.
not_proven: No files were edited in this read-only design pass.
No checker, mutation, compileall, git diff --check, or temp-source-copy --all gate was run in this pass.
The AGENTS.md archive/status-kernel packet paths were not present in this checkout.
Codex native sync, Claude native sync, MCP projection behavior.
Source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, Movement authority.

After-merge behavior for stale holds: provider-ladder-fleet-presets-0612, dashboard-productization-0612, dashboard-productization-0612b, adapter-30-s1-park, and f10-grounding-demand-record-unify-0612 remain not proven until the implementation and paper-stop proof run.
observed_evidence: Current checkout: /Users/smith/projects/BRICK-wt-f14 on branch claude/track-f14; git status showed no short-status file changes.

The archive/status-kernel operating-packet paths named by AGENTS.md are absent in this checkout; project/brick-protocol/PROGRESS.md is present and says the projection is not source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, or Movement authority.

run_building_plan computes the root and emits building_started before any declaration-chain write; declaration packets are currently written inside write_accumulated_building_evidence after step execution or frontier handling.
walker_resume refuses resume when work/declared-building-plan.json is absent and also refuses generic resume when a held Building has no recorded Agent returns.
adapter-error frontier evidence records Agent receipt/frontier without returned AgentFact; current stop disposition handling is reached only after a replayed held step result exists.
agent_adapter.py appends --ephemeral for Codex whenever session_continuity_mode == none; no BRICK_CODEX_EPHEMERAL env dial is present.

Existing checker coverage includes adapter_error_frontier_manifest_consistency and dynamic adapter-frontier root/agent_incomplete assertions, but no observed F18 env-dial pin and no observed zero-adapter-call stop pin for adapter-error holds.

proposed_changes: F15/F17: add a narrow pre-adapter birth/declaration writer call after plan validation and root preflight, before building_started emission and before the first run_step/connect_agent_brain call. Reuse declaration_packets output shape so the later accumulated/frontier writer remains byte-compatible.

F16: add an adapter-error-stop paper path in the resume layer before recorded-return replay is required. When the current held frontier is adapter-error/agent_incomplete and the selected human/COO disposition_action is stop, record resumed->closed ended-by-disposition from existing ledger/frontier facts and return without run_step/connect_agent_brain.

F19: on overwrite_existing=True, clear or replace stale generated claim_trace/evidence-manifest/raw-manifest frontier residue for the target Building root before the fresh walk writes new evidence, then reuse reconcile_claim_trace_raw_manifest_from_raw or the same raw-ref resolution discipline to prove the fresh root is internally consistent.
F18: change Codex argv assembly so --ephemeral is appended only when BRICK_CODEX_EPHEMERAL == 1; absent/default keeps machine-local Codex rollouts outside repo evidence.

relevant_current_structure.adapter_surface: support/connection/agent_adapter.py builds local Codex CLI argv and currently owns the --ephemeral behavior.
relevant_current_structure.checker_surfaces: support/checkers/check_profile.py dispatches kernel checks; support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py already contains adapter-error frontier manifest and mutation-style fixture checks.
relevant_current_structure.recording_surfaces: support/recording/declaration_packets.py already writes work/task.md, work/building-intake.json, work/preset-expansion.json, work/declared-building-plan.json, and work/link-launch-policy.json; support/recording/raw_claim_trace.py already reconciles claim_trace raw refs from raw streams.
relevant_current_structure.run_surfaces: support/operator/run.py owns public run_building_plan and resume_building_plan; support/operator/walker_kernel.py owns dynamic forward/resume loop mechanics; support/operator/walker_resume.py owns resume-after-HOLD orchestration.

returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: No link/*, agent/*, brick/*, project/*, .git/*, AGENTS.md, pyproject.toml, uv.lock, npm/node, scheduler, queue, retry, provider runtime, source-truth, success-judgment, quality-judgment, or Movement-authority changes.
AgentFact remains closed as received_work/returned; adapter-error remains no returned AgentFact.
Reporter/dashboard/projection freshness remains support evidence only.
Codex session bodies stay machine-local under Codex state; repo evidence records refs/observations only.
